task_completion.description: Agent opens and reads the operations brief.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window is open displaying the contents of /home/ga/Documents/QGC/ops_brief.txt.

task_completion.description: Agent opens the drone mission planning software (e.g., QGroundControl).
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl or a similar drone mission planning application is open on the screen, specifically in the 'Plan' or mission creation view.

task_completion.description: Agent adds Takeoff and Waypoint commands to the mission.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The mission item list (usually on the right side of the screen) or the map view shows a 'Takeoff' command and multiple 'Waypoint' items.

task_completion.description: Agent adds Loiter and Speed Change commands to the mission.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The mission item list shows 'Loiter' (or 'Hold') commands and 'Change Speed' commands inserted between or at specific waypoints.

task_completion.description: Agent adds a Return to Launch (RTL) command at the end of the mission.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final item in the mission list is 'Return to Launch' or 'RTL'.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the completed mission plan to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or file manager shows the mission being saved with the filename 'boundary_inspection.plan' in the '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/' directory, or a success notification indicating the file was saved there.

integrity.description: Agent used the graphical user interface of the mission planner to create the mission.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking on the map and interacting with the mission planner's GUI menus to add waypoints and commands, rather than typing out a JSON/text .plan file in a text editor.

integrity.description: Agent used the application's native save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file is saved via the 'File -> Save' or 'Sync' GUI elements of the mission planner, not by using terminal commands like 'cp' or 'echo' to place a pre-made file.

integrity.description: Agent did not run an external script to generate the mission plan.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no terminal window showing the execution of a Python or bash script designed to automatically generate the boundary_inspection.plan file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The operations brief is located at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/ops_brief.txt. The final mission plan must be saved exactly to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/boundary_inspection.plan. The mission must include Takeoff, Waypoints, Loiter, Speed changes, and RTL commands.
